headline: United Rentals (URI) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
summary: Matthew Flannery: Thank you operator and good morning everyone.  Today, I'll discuss our fourth-quarter results, followed by our expectations for 2025 and finally, recap why we are excited about the H&E acquisition we announced a few weeks ago.  Then Ted will discuss the financials in detail before we open up the call for Q&A which we will keep focused on United Rentals as a stand-alone company.

raw.headline: United Rentals (URI) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
raw.summary: Matthew Flannery: Thank you operator and good morning everyone.  Today, I'll discuss our fourth-quarter results, followed by our expectations for 2025 and finally, recap why we are excited about the H&E acquisition we announced a few weeks ago.  Then Ted will discuss the financials in detail before we open up the call for Q&A which we will keep focused on United Rentals as a stand-alone company.

headline: S&P 500 Stocks: Equipment Giant Flashes Buy Signal On Earnings
summary: United Rentals is leading all S&P 500 stocks early Thursday on the strength of Q1 results and an updated earnings outlook delivered after Wednesday's close.  United Rentals reported its first profit gain and its strongest revenue growth since the fourth quarter of 2024.  "The increases to our full-year guidance are supported by the momentum we are carrying into our busy season and the growth opportunities our customers see on the horizon, particularly within large projects and key verticals," CEO Matthew Flannery said in the earnings release.

raw.headline: S&P 500 Stocks: Equipment Giant Flashes Buy Signal On Earnings
raw.summary: United Rentals is leading all S&P 500 stocks early Thursday on the strength of Q1 results and an updated earnings outlook delivered after Wednesday's close.  United Rentals reported its first profit gain and its strongest revenue growth since the fourth quarter of 2024.  "The increases to our full-year guidance are supported by the momentum we are carrying into our busy season and the growth opportunities our customers see on the horizon, particularly within large projects and key verticals," CEO Matthew Flannery said in the earnings release.
